# DropdownMenu

Displays a keyboard-accessible menu of actions from a trigger.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/dropdown-menu
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="dropdown-menu"
  example={0}
  code={`<DropdownMenu.Root><DropdownMenu.Trigger>Open</DropdownMenu.Trigger><DropdownMenu.Content><DropdownMenu.Item>Edit</DropdownMenu.Item></DropdownMenu.Content></DropdownMenu.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<DropdownMenu.Root>
  <DropdownMenu.Trigger>Open</DropdownMenu.Trigger>
  <DropdownMenu.Content>
    <DropdownMenu.Item>Edit</DropdownMenu.Item>
  </DropdownMenu.Content>
</DropdownMenu.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="dropdown-menu"
  example={1}
  code={`<DropdownMenu.Label>Project</DropdownMenu.Label><DropdownMenu.Separator />`}
/>

```tsx
<DropdownMenu.Label>Project</DropdownMenu.Label><DropdownMenu.Separator />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="dropdown-menu"
  example={2}
  code={`<DropdownMenu.Item>Rename<DropdownMenu.Shortcut>⌘R</DropdownMenu.Shortcut></DropdownMenu.Item>`}
/>

```tsx
<DropdownMenu.Item>
  Rename<DropdownMenu.Shortcut>⌘R</DropdownMenu.Shortcut>
</DropdownMenu.Item>
```

## Props

No component-specific props are documented yet. Primitive props pass through to the underlying element or Radix part.

| Variant | Values          |
| ------- | --------------- |
| `inset` | `true`, `false` |
